title: AI Agents & Automation
tagline: Build intelligent products with LLMs, agents and automation workflows
description: Master LLMs, AI agents and automation to build products that 99% of developers can't. This program covers everything from OpenAI APIs to deploying production-grade AI tools with real users.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Integrate LLMs like GPT-4, Claude and Gemini into production apps
Build autonomous AI agents with tool-calling and memory
Create RAG pipelines with vector databases for semantic search
Automate complex workflows with LangChain and CrewAI
Ship AI-powered SaaS with subscriptions and user management
Deploy and monitor AI systems with cost and latency optimisation

title: System Design & DSA Masterclass
tagline: Crack senior engineer interviews at top product companies
description: The most focused interview prep program for engineers targeting senior roles at Swiggy, Razorpay, PhonePe and similar companies. Covers HLD, LLD, and 300+ DSA problems.
whatYouLearn: Design systems like URL shorteners, Instagram, WhatsApp and Uber
Master data structures: arrays, trees, graphs, heaps and tries
Solve 300+ LeetCode-style problems with time/space complexity analysis
Understand CAP theorem, consistency models and distributed systems
Design low-level class hierarchies with SOLID principles
Perform confidently in whiteboard and live coding interviews

title: Python for Data Science
tagline: Master Python from ground up — the essential first step before ML & AI
description: A focused 6-week intensive covering Python from zero — data structures, OOP, file handling, and everything you need to start your Data Science journey. Build 2 real-world projects and write clean, professional Python by Week 6.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Write clean, readable Python programs from absolute scratch
Use all data structures — list, dict, set, tuple — like a pro
Apply OOP principles to build real modular programs
Handle exceptions and read/write files (txt, CSV, JSON)
Use Python's built-in library and install packages with pip
Build complete command-line applications
Confidently start learning NumPy, Pandas and Data Analytics

topics: Variables, Data Types, Operators & Type Casting

curriculum.module: Module 7 & 8 — File I/O, Modules & Modern Python (Week 5–6)
topics: Built-in modules: os, sys, math, random
f-strings, walrus operator & PEP 8 best practices

projects.name: WhatsApp Chat Analyser
projects.desc: Parse a real WhatsApp export to uncover message counts, top senders, emoji usage and word frequency — saved as a formatted report

projects.name: Personal Expense Tracker
projects.desc: CLI app with OOP, CSV storage, category filtering, monthly summaries and exception handling

title: Data Science & Machine Learning
tagline: Zero to job-ready Data Scientist — Python, ML, Deep Learning & Gen AI in 8 months
description: A complete 8-month Data Science mastery program — 4 structured courses covering Python, Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning and Generative AI. Build 10+ real-world projects and graduate targeting roles like Data Scientist, ML Engineer, Deep Learning Engineer and AI Developer.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Write professional Python programs and solve real data problems from scratch
Load, clean, analyse and visualise any dataset like a senior analyst
Build, tune and deploy ML models for classification, regression and clustering
Design and train deep neural networks for vision, NLP and generative tasks
Deploy production AI models with Flask and FastAPI
Build LLM-powered pipelines with LangChain, RAG and vector databases
Use Gen AI tools to supercharge your data science productivity

topics: Variables, Data Types, Operators & Control Flow
Data Structures: Lists, Tuples, Sets, Dicts

curriculum.module: Course 2 — Data Analytics with Python (2 Months)
topics: NumPy: N-d arrays, broadcasting & math ops
Matplotlib & Seaborn: charts, heatmaps & pair plots
RegEx, Text Pre-processing & Image Data basics — 2 Projects

curriculum.module: Course 4 — Deep Learning & Neural Networks (2 Months)
topics: RNN, LSTM & GRU for sequence modelling
Model Deployment with Flask / FastAPI — 2 Projects

curriculum.module: Bonus — Generative AI for Data Scientists
topics: LLMs: GPT-4, Gemini, Claude & OpenAI API
Hugging Face models, bias detection & Responsible AI

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Write clean Python programs and solve real data problems from scratch
Clean, transform and analyse messy datasets using NumPy and Pandas
Extract and transform data from any relational database using SQL
Apply statistical thinking to validate findings and present data-backed conclusions
Design impactful visualisations with Matplotlib, Seaborn and Plotly
Build professional, interactive dashboards in Power BI and Tableau
Use Excel and Gen AI tools to become 3x more productive as a Data Analyst

Joins: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL, SELF
Data Storytelling: Right Chart for Right Data

Mock Interviews: SQL, Python, Stats & Case Studies

title: Full Stack Web Development
tagline: From zero to deploying real full-stack apps — HTML to AWS in 15 weeks
description: A complete 15-week Full Stack program covering HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, React, SQL, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS and Gen AI. Build 5+ real production apps and graduate with a strong portfolio and full placement support.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Build and structure any web page with semantic HTML5 and CSS3
Build polished, mobile-first UIs rapidly with Bootstrap
Write dynamic, interactive web apps with modern JavaScript (ES6+)
Build fast, component-driven SPAs with React.js hooks and routing
Design and query relational databases with SQL
Build secure, scalable REST APIs with Node.js, Express and JWT auth
Deploy full production applications on AWS EC2 with CI/CD

Connecting to APIs with Axios / Fetch

Redis caching, Multer file uploads, Payment APIs

title: C / C++ Programming
tagline: Master the foundation of all modern software — from C basics to object-oriented C++
description: A complete C and C++ program covering pointers, memory management, OOP, data structures and file handling. Two structured courses — start with C fundamentals, then master object-oriented C++ with templates, STL and real projects.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Write structured C programs from scratch and understand how memory works
Use arrays, strings, pointers and dynamic memory allocation confidently
Build modular, reusable programs with functions and recursion
Model real-world data with structures and file handling
Design clean, encapsulated classes with OOP principles in C++
Implement inheritance, polymorphism, templates and STL in C++
Write generic, maintainable software systems ready for DSA and competitive coding

curriculum.module: C Course — Module 1 & 2: Basics & Control Flow
C Course — Module 3 & 4: Arrays, Functions & Pointers
topics: Function Declaration, Call by Value vs Reference
Pointer Arithmetic, Pointers with Arrays & Strings
Dynamic Memory: malloc, calloc, free, Pointer to Pointer

curriculum.module: C Course — Module 5: Structures, Files & Project
topics: Structures, Array of Structures, typedef & enum
Storage Classes: auto, static, extern, register
C vs C++ differences, iostream, cin/cout, namespace
this Pointer, Inline Functions, Passing Objects
Operator Overloading, Deep Copy vs Shallow Copy

curriculum.module: C++ Course — Module 4–5: Inheritance, Templates & STL

projects.name: C Logic Application
projects.desc: Structured C program using arrays, pointers and file handling

projects.name: C Mini Project
projects.desc: Real-world C application with structures, enums and file I/O

projects.name: C++ OOP Application
projects.desc: Class-based C++ app demonstrating encapsulation and operator overloading

projects.name: C++ Final Project
projects.desc: OOP-based system using inheritance, templates and STL containers
